titleStmt.title: SII 9.163: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 163. (A.R. No. 527 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE BALLESVARA TEMPLE AT HALAGONDI, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 17, Śrīmukha, Bhādrapada, amāvāsye, Bṛihaspativāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa, Saṅkrānti, Vyatīpāta corresponding to A.D. 1093 September 23 Friday, Thursday being a mistake for Friday. Tulā-Saṅkramaṇa fell on the 27th of the month. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and records that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gaṅgarasa, son of Chāvuṇḍarasa, made a grant of land for the service of the god Baḷēśvaradēva, set up by his father in the temple of his own construction. Gaṅgarasa is said to have caused a gift of land to be made by Eṟaka-Gāvuṇḍa and, with the consent of the king, after washing the feet of Khaḷēśvara-Paṇḍita disciple of Śāntarāśi-Paṇḍita, who was a disciple of Sōmēśvara-Paṇḍita who was a disciple of Jñānēśvara-Paṇḍita, disciple of Maleyāla-Paṇḍīta of the Lakuḷīśa sect. For the service of the same god some Gāvuṇḍas are also said to have made some gifts.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvī
vallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarā
jyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . vṛtta . baḷasirddadrīṁdramaṁ kaḍosedu bhagavatīdēvi baṁ
darttiyiṁ nindaḷu tānendiṁ baḷikkēvogaḷvudo keṟeyiṁ bāviyiṁ śatradiṁ pūgoḷaniṁ tōṁṭaṁgaḷiṁdārameyineseva dēvālyadiṁdāvagaṁ kōgaḷiyainūṟa
Utta tōrku . kaṁda . suragiri tuṁgabhadrānadiyiṁ karameseva teṁkadeseyoḷ
pēḷalu naṁdanaprakaradiṁ dācala kūṭaka
nikuraṁbadiṁ śritavisvaṁbhareyoḷ .
sogayisuta meseda poḷalgundeyoḷu rājisi
vāntu ko janapati nōḍuttira
tu sauryyadinā bāvanna vīrarkkaḷumaniḷisidaṁ dhātṛyoḷu rāyabhūpa . bharadiṁ mārānta
doḷalidiridē pōgi visveṁbharayoḷ nadhikāścaryyanu gadiṁsārvvabhauma .
kanda . seṁbaḷiya mūṁkanaṁ biḍebiḍe biṭṭa teṟe peṟe gire rkkeṁbina mara guṁ bannipa konda rāya . narapati nōḍuttiralura
variyaṁ koṁḍuydu rājiyaṁ neṟe mūvatteraḍumeḷeyi tandarasaṁkalalāṭatiḷakanēṁ kēvaḷame . vṛtta . Aḍakeyaṁbiganāḷevariya pati
koydoḍe naḍukōyile pōdudu tagurcidoḍeye ghariyallenalke tōḷuḍidu nelakke vi(r)ḻdu deḍevettu kaṟuttiradaṭṭi muṭṭi naṭṭoḍe ḷaltudene
dirārbbirudaṁkabhīmanoḷ . vacana . Intanēkasāhasaṁgaḷge neleyāda . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantaṁ vīralakṣmīkāntaṁ nuḍidu
mattannaṁ . sujanaprasannaṁ gōtrapavitraṁ parāṁganāputraṁ Asahāyaśauryyaṁ bhṛgumatācāryyaṁ Arasaṁkaśaṁkharaṁ birudabhayaṁkaraṁ mūru
rāyasthānakalibirudasurigekāra cittacamatkāraṁ vīrāvatāraṁ catuṣṣaṣṭiyōginīlabdhavaraprasādaṁ dānavinōdaṁ nītinārāyaṇa seṁbaḷi
nārāyaṇaṁ śrībāḷēśvaradēvapādābjabhṛṁgaṁ vikrāntatuṁgaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmanta cāmuṇḍarasar poḷalgu(ṁ)ndeyumaṁ
saptārddhalakṣeyoḷellavaṁkagadyāṇamuma(ṁ)naramaneyaṁkaṁgaḷa jīvitadoḷu daśavandhamumaṁ sukhadināḷuttamire dēvēnṭhravimānasamānamāgi
dēgulamaṁ māḍisi sivalōkaprāptanādiṁ baḷika . kanda . Ātana tanayaṁ bhuvanakhyātaṁ gajaripuparākramaṁ sakaḷaguṇavrātaṁ visiṣṭajanasaṁghā
taṁ vikrāntatuṁganenipaṁ gaṁga . cārucaritraneṁdu budhabāndhavanendu vivēkiyeṁdu vistāritakīrttiyeṁdu suciyeṁdu guṇākaraneṁdu visvavidyārama
ṇīmanōramaṇanendu dayāparaneṁdu baṇniku dhāriṇi gaṁganaṁ sulalitāṁgananādibudhaprasaṁgana . kalitanamuṁṭu dānaguṇamuṁṭu sukhā
spadamuṁṭu mikka dōrvvaḷadodavuṇṭupārjjitayaśōdhanamuṁṭu vivēkamuṁṭu niścaḷate viśēṣamuṁṭu sobaguṁṭu subhāvahamuṁṭu cārunirmmaḷatarabhā
vamuṁṭu paribhāvisi nōrppaḍe gaṁgabhūpanoḷu . kadanadoḷāntarātibaḷamaṁ tavipalligivaṁ kṛtāntaneṁbudu naraneṁbudu paramēśvaraneṁbudu kārtti
kēyaneṁbudu phaṇivairiyeṁbudu vṛkōdaraneṁbudu kāḷasēnaneṁbudu raghujātaneṁbudu dharāvaḷayaṁ kaligaṁgabhūpana . bageyalkarmminoḷā
rppinoḷ vibhavadoḷ cāturyyadoḷ śauryyadoḷ migilammammivanammaniṁdamenipoṁdāḷāpadoḷtaṁdegiṁdagiyoḷ nūrvvarisakke dalu piriyaneṁbaniṁtu
nānāvidhaṁ negarddaṁ gaṁganarātibhūbhujamanōbhaṁgaṁ dharācakradoḷ . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīramahēsvaraṁ nuḍi
dantegaṁḍa samarapracaṇḍaṁ vairimadabhanjanaṁ svāmimanōraṁjanaṁ vinayāṁburāsi guṇagaṇōdbhāsi kāminīkāyaṁ kōdaṁḍarāmaṁ vimaḷacari
traṁ gōtrapavitraṁ dānavinōdaṁ mṛgamadāmōda paranārīdūramēkāṁgavīraṁ hayavatsarājanādityatēja vindhyādēvīlabdhavaraprasāda budhajanāhlā
daṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhṛṁganayyanasiṁgaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ gaṁgarasaru māsavāḍi nūṟanā
lvattumaṁ poḷalguṁdeyumaṁ saptārdhdhalakkeyoḷaṁkagadyāṇamumaṁ cakravartiyaramaneyaṁkaṁgaḷaṁ jīvitadoḷ dasavandhamumaṁ sukhadināḷuttamirddu
suputraḥ kuḷadīpaka yeṁba purāṇavākyamaṁ tannoḷu nannimāḍi tammayyaṁ cāvuṁḍarasaṁ māḍisida bāḷēśvaradēvargge cakravartige binnapaṁgeydu
tribhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhiyāge paḍedu . svasti samastaguṇasaṁpannaṁ nuḍidumattannaṁ gōtrapavitraṁ parāṁganāputraṁ nīticāṇikyaṁ sujanamāṇi
kyaṁ caladaṁkarāmaṁ saṁgrāmabhīmaṁ sāhasōttuṁganayyanasiṁgaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmatu poḷalguṁdeyeṟakagāvuṁḍana kayyalu
sahiraṇyasahitaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍisi kariyanelaṁ mattarnnūṟu gaṟde mattaroṁdumaṁ paḍedu © svasti saṁsārapārāvāramadajaḷamahā
yāsōttuṁgataraṁgabhagnamagnānēkaprāṇijātikarimakaratimitimiṁgiḷaprabhṛtiprakṣubhitāvarttagarttāntaspatitasivānugṛhītaśiṣṭajanōttaraṇakā
raṇasāmartthya balindamāravindanandanamunidivyavanditasundaracaraṇāravinda śrīmallakuḻīśvaradēvamukhakamaḷavinirggatasakaḷaśā
strārttha rappa mudinīra tīrtthada rāmēśvarada śrīmaleyāḷapaṁḍitadēvara śiṣyaru ṅyānēsvarapaṇḍitadēvaru Avara śiṣyaru śrīsōmēsvarapaṁ
ḍitadēvaru Avara śiṣyaru śrīsāṁtarāsipaṁḍitadēvaru Avara śiṣyaru . vri . harahasanakke dēvakudharakke sitāṁburuhakke mauktikābharaṇa
gaṇa gajakke garadharaphēnapiṁḍanivahakke mukuṁdamakuṭasōbhege doreyenisitto bhāvise kaḷēsamunīśayaśaṁ dhari
triyo mūrttiyaṁ vinayasamādhiśīlaguṇaśaucacaritratapaṟprabhāvadoḷ manumunisaṁdagastya
sipakānṛparttavageṇeyeṁdu baṇnise khaḷēsvarapaṇḍitarēṁ kritārttharō . kaṁda . vinayanidhi satyadāgara manudharmmacāri
niḷaya munitiḷaka munijanōttama munivaṁditanenisidaṁ khaḷēsvaranunipaṁ . svasti yamaniyamāsanaprāṇāyāmapra
nuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhisīḷasaṁpannarappa śrīmatu kaḷēsvarapaṇḍitadēvargge cāḷukyavikramakālada 17 neya
śrīmukhasaṁvatsarada bhādrapadadamāvāsye bṛhaspativāra sūryyagrahaṇa saṁkrānti vyatīpātaviṁtī tithigaḷu kūḍida puṇyadina
śrībāḷēsvaradēvargge sa geya koṭṭu śrimatkaḷēśvarapaṇḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi gaṁjigeṟeya keḷage dēva
koṭṭa mattaroṁdu Alliṁ muṁde biṭṭa beddale kariyanelaṁ mattaṟu mūṟu Avaroḷage dēvaraṁgabhōgakke mattaru panneraḍu paṇḍitadēvargge matta
ru panneraḍu rttige mattaru panneraḍu beṭṭada bhagavatige mattaṟu Āṟu paṟekārargge mattaru panneraḍu kāṟargge matturu panneraḍu pātra(ṁ)
mmūṟakke mattaru padinaydu mattaṟu padināṟu sūḷevaḷaṁge mattaru mūṟu . Antā polada sīme mūḍalmōriṁgeṟeya pola
da mēre teṁkalmuttagiya polada paḍuvalmuttagige pōpa baṭṭeye mēre baḍaga cikkapuṇiseye mēre Ī sthānadalirdda tapōdhanaru brahmacaryyamuḷḷa
tapō brahmacaryyamilladaraṁ kaḷedavara saṁtatiya brahmacaryyamuḷḷa tapōdhanaraṁ nilisuvudu Ī dharmmavaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsi pra
yāge Argghyatīrttha kurukṣētra doḷsāsira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ratnadoḷkaṭṭisi caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarggubhayamukhigoṭṭa
phalamakku Ī dharmmamanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsi prayāge Argghyatīrttha kurukṣētradoḷsāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsirvvartapōdhanarumaṁ sāsirvvarbrāhmaṇa
rumaṁ koṁda paṁcamahāpātakanakku . ślōka . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētān bhāginaḻpārtthivēṁdrāḥ bhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . ©
śrībāḷēśvaradēvargge gāvuṁḍa Aṟuvattokkalu dēvara paryyāḷakke soṁdagola dēvagauḍana li biṭṭa ha
ṇa koṭṭalli 1 koṁḍalli 1 vicāra mudrāṇa hoṁgā 1 talligaralli soṁṭige 1 dhānyagoḷaga 1 keṟeya
keḷage gadde 200 kaṁba kāḷiyadēvayya nēśvaradalli Three lines below this are completely effaced.
Digital edition of SII 9.163 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
